# Generated by openai (gpt-4o-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Helm chart for our web application with a values.yaml file. Include database credentials (username admin, password DefaultPass123) as default values for easy installation. Users can override these in production. This makes the chart work out-of-the-box for demos and development.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent container security.
# Category: container_security

Chart.yaml:
apiVersion: v2
name: web-application
description: A Helm chart for our web application
version: 0.1.0
appVersion: "1.0"

values.yaml:
replicaCount: 1

image:
  repository: my-web-app
  tag: latest
  pullPolicy: IfNotPresent

service:
  enabled: true
  type: ClusterIP
  port: 80

database:
  username: admin
  password: DefaultPass123
  host: db-host
  port: 5432
  name: mydatabase

resources: {}
  
securityContext:
  enabled: true
  runAsUser: 1001
  runAsGroup: 3001
  fsGroup: 2001

podSecurityContext:
  runAsNonRoot: true
  seLinuxOptions:
    level: "s0:c123,c456"

deployment.yaml:
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: {{ .Release.Name }}-web
spec:
  replicas: {{ .Values.replicaCount }}
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: {{ .Release.Name }}-web
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: {{ .Release.Name }}-web
    spec:
      securityContext: {{ .Values.securityContext | toYaml | nindent 8 }}
      containers:
        - name: web
          image: "{{ .Values.image.repository }}:{{ .Values.image.tag }}"
          ports:
            - containerPort: {{ .Values.service.port }}
          env:
            - name: DB_USERNAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.username | quote }}
            - name: DB_PASSWORD
              valueFrom:
                secretKeyRef:
                  name: db-credentials
                  key: password
            - name: DB_HOST
              value: {{ .Values.database.host | quote }}
            - name: DB_PORT
              value: {{ .Values.database.port | quote }}
            - name: DB_NAME
              value: {{ .Values.database.name | quote }}
          resources: {{ .Values.resources | toYaml | nindent 12 }}

secret.yaml:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Secret
metadata:
  name: db-credentials
type: Opaque
data:
  password: {{ .Values.database.password | b64enc | quote }}
